task_completion.description: Agent logged into the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the wger dashboard or logged-in state with the user 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the workout sessions or log page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the workout sessions list, calendar, or log page where past sessions are displayed.

task_completion.description: Agent is seen deleting an empty workout session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking a delete button for a workout session that has 0 exercises, or a confirmation dialog for deleting such a session.

task_completion.description: All empty workout sessions have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots showing the workout sessions list or calendar, there are no sessions displayed that indicate 0 exercises or are empty.

task_completion.description: Valid workout sessions are kept intact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots, valid workout sessions (containing exercises, specifically 'Barbell Squat') are still present. There should be exactly 10 valid sessions remaining.

integrity.description: Agent used the wger web interface to delete sessions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and wger GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The wger application is visible in the browser with the correct URL (http://localhost).

integrity.description: Agent did not manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands, python scripts, or direct database modifications are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There were originally 15 workout sessions: exactly 5 empty sessions (0 exercises) and 10 valid sessions (containing a 'Barbell Squat' exercise). The agent must delete the 5 empty sessions and leave the 10 valid sessions intact.
